ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartphone, tablet) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Current hardware version of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the interaction (e.g., movement, standard, hardware) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "movement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of movement during the interaction */,
  "movement_interactions" INTEGER /* Count of interactions related to movement */,
  "arkbox_interactions" INTEGER /* Count of interactions with Arkbox feature */,
  "standard_interactions" INTEGER /* Count of standard interactions */,
  "hardware_interactions" INTEGER /* Count of hardware-related interactions */,
  "key" TEXT /* Unique key for the interaction session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user associated with the interaction */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the device associated with the interaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction occurred */,
  "date_in_ticks" TEXT /* Ticks representing the date for internal usage */,
  "ttl" INTEGER /* Time-to-live value for the interaction record */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of interaction (foreign key to interaction_types) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES hardware_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_keys" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key associated with the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user associated with the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the metrics */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the metrics */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of interactions for the user on the device */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions recorded */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the reported metrics */,
  "engagement_score" TEXT /* Calculated engagement score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES hardware_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction event */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of interaction (foreign key to interaction_types) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "launch_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the application was launched */,
  "crash_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the application crashed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_component_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction event */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware component */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of interaction (foreign key to interaction_types) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "failure_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the component failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_component_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocation_data" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction event */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the user's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the user's location */,
  "altitude" TEXT /* Altitude of the user's location */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the geolocation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who provided feedback */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the device associated with the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text feedback provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES hardware_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_usage_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the device associated with the statistics */,
  "total_usage_time" INTEGER /* Total time the device has been used */,
  "average_battery_life" TEXT /* Average battery life of the device */,
  "average_memory_usage" TEXT /* Average memory usage of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_statistics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES hardware_devices ("device_id")
)
